stagedChanges.summary: Move Org Summit out of active/in-motion state now that the Jun 9-11 window has passed.
stagedChanges.why: The dashboard still shows Org Summit as `designing` / `in motion`, but its dated window ended on Jun 11. It likely needs `delivered` or `follow-up`, not active design.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval because I do not have confirmation of what follow-up remains or whether it is safe to mark done.

stagedChanges.summary: Triage past-due open items from Jun 8-12 instead of letting them linger as stale deadlines.
stagedChanges.why: Open items still dated Jun 8, Jun 10, and Jun 12 include Dan SAE champions doc, Smartsheet impact mapping, Charlotta follow-up, and next MCO meeting with Andy.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval to decide whether each is done, deferred, still active, or no longer relevant.

stagedChanges.summary: Resolve or work around the calendar pull blocker before trusting the Day Schedule.
stagedChanges.why: The live dashboard schedule for Jul 2 shows a Gog keyring auth blocker instead of calendar events, while the local source still has the older Jun 22 schedule.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus or Z follow-up before applying schedule changes; safe next step is to verify Outlook directly or repair non-interactive Gog auth.

stagedChanges.summary: Review post-date workshop statuses for Pharmacy cohorts and Org Summit.
stagedChanges.why: Pharmacy Cohort 2hr(a/b) are dated Jun 25 but still marked designing, and Org Summit is mixed across the dashboard as done/follow-up/scheduled.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval to decide delivered, follow-up, or closed for each item.

stagedChanges.summary: Triage overdue and today-dated to-dos before the list gets stale.
stagedChanges.why: Open items dated Jun 24-Jun 29, Jul 1, and Jul 2 remain active, including Bravely/admin follow-ups, TPP clinical AI follow-up, and AEUs in WorkDay.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval to mark done, defer, keep active, or drop.

stagedChanges.summary: Clear or mark resolved the old Jul 2 calendar-auth blocker staged item.
stagedChanges.where: Staged drawer + Day Schedule review notes
stagedChanges.why: Both local and live dashboard JSON now show a refreshed Jul 6 schedule, so the Jul 2 "calendar auth blocker" staged item appears stale.
stagedChanges.note: Safe to apply if Gus agrees the calendar refresh is working again; I did not remove it automatically.

stagedChanges.summary: Sync the markdown source dashboard from the current live/local JSON state.
stagedChanges.why: The JSON/live dashboard is dated Jul 6, but the markdown source still says week of Jun 22 and schedule snapshot Jul 3. Source docs are drifting behind the visible dashboard.
stagedChanges.note: Mechanical but visible source hygiene; needs approval before rewriting source docs around the current week.

stagedChanges.summary: Triage today-dated items and the Jul 9 GEP Admins workshop prep state.
stagedChanges.why: Two open todos are dated Jul 6, TPP follow-up is still open from Jul 1, and GEP Admins is scheduled for Jul 9 after today's GEP Preflight block.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval or a quick correction: mark done, defer, keep active, or update workshop stage to designing/ready.

stagedChanges.summary: Use today's JFC and GEP blocks to pin down next visible deliverables.
stagedChanges.where: Day Schedule + To-Dos lane + Workshop Tracker
stagedChanges.why: Today's calendar has two JFC blocks plus a GEP Admins preflight before the Jul 9 workshop; open Jul 1/Jul 6 dashboard to-dos still need triage.
stagedChanges.note: Suggested nudge: capture decisions from the JFC feedback block and confirm whether GEP Admins is designing or ready after the preflight.

stagedChanges.summary: Confirm GEP Admins readiness before tomorrow's Jul 9 session.
stagedChanges.why: The live dashboard still has GEP Admins as scheduled with deck/prep details to firm up, and the Jul 7 staged note expected a preflight decision.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval or quick correction: set to ready/designing, add the concrete next prep step, or leave scheduled if nothing changed.

stagedChanges.summary: Sync local dashboard source files with the Jul 8 live dashboard state.
stagedChanges.where: 00_master-dashboard-weekly-control.md, dashboard-data.local.json, To-Dos lane, and Workshops lane
stagedChanges.why: The live dashboard is refreshed for Jul 8, but local markdown/source files still show older week and schedule snapshots in several places.
stagedChanges.note: Mechanical source hygiene, but it rewrites visible working-source context, so it should wait for approval.

zSyncNote: 2026-07-09 morning briefing sync: Day Schedule refreshed from DFCI work calendar via Gog; routine blocks suppressed; lanes/todos preserved; no inferred status changes applied.
